observed_overlap: Permissive `俾` makes NP2 the allowed participant in the following VP.
decisive_difference: Passive and indirect-passive readings assign different roles and remain specific to `俾`; other pivotal verbs do not inherit that ambiguity.

current_role: Exact lexical cause-result predicate `整冧咗 + affected object`
observed_overlap: Both may be translated with English make/cause.
decisive_difference: The cause-result frame lacks an overt object-control pivot and links causing/result predicates rather than a complement-taking V1 to NP+VP.

current_role: Clause wrapper around an attested communication predicate
observed_overlap: `叫` may convey a directive speech act.
decisive_difference: Speech transfer or reported content need not contain an overt pivot that controls a following VP; the current wrapper does not establish `叫 NP VP`.

current_role: Subject plus intention predicate and VP
observed_overlap: Both can contain an unrealized embedded event.
decisive_difference: The understood actor of an intention VP is normally tied to the matrix experiencer, while pivotal `叫 NP VP` overtly introduces a distinct lower actor.

current_role: Lexical `叫/叫做` naming or calling predicate
observed_overlap: Shares graph and pronunciation with directive `叫`.
decisive_difference: Naming selects a name/label or calling relation, not an NP that controls an event predicate merely by token identity.
No checked contemporary Cantonese source establishes its complement, register, or productivity in the target family.

observed_overlap: Shares a written causative form with Standard Chinese.
decisive_difference: Inspected runtime `使` is the necessity-modal arm associated with `唔使`; causative use and segmentation are not independently sourced here.

current_role: Matrix predicate selecting a proposition with its own subject
observed_overlap: Surface `V NP VP` can resemble pivotal control.
decisive_difference: The pivotal analysis relates the medial NP to both predicates; proposition-selecting predicates require separate displacement, scope, and semantic diagnostics.

current_role: Discourse-recoverable unexpressed NP in ordinary clauses
observed_overlap: Matrix or embedded participants may be contextually recoverable.
decisive_difference: No checked source establishes which pivotal argument can be omitted without changing the construction or interpretation.
